no_changes_rationale:
status: already_satisfied
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/graphql/ -run OperatorPrompt -count=1 -timeout 180s

The bead's implementation already lives in the base revision (5d345513),
inherited from commit 5ebab96d "feat(graphql): operatorPromptSubmit cap/Origin
checks + audit fields [ddx-a7e7a1a1]". The prior review BLOCK was on an
earlier attempt whose diff did not include code changes; the work has since
landed and is present at the base-rev for this attempt.

AC mapping (all in cli/internal/server/graphql/):

  - Mutation creates bead with issueType=operator-prompt, status=proposed,
    prompt body verbatim:
      resolver_operator_prompt.go OperatorPromptSubmit + bead.NewOperatorPromptBead
      Test: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_HappyPath
            (resolver_operator_prompt_test.go)

  - Non-trusted origin returns 403:
      Enforced by requireTrusted gate at cli/internal/server/server.go
      wrapping /graphql; CSRF + Origin checks add defense-in-depth at the
      resolver (errCSRF, errCrossOrigin -> "status: 403").

  - Oversize returns 400 with cap-error envelope:
      promptCapError() in resolver_operator_prompt.go (code=PROMPT_TOO_LARGE,
      status=400, observed_bytes, cap_bytes, config_hint).
      Tests: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_OversizeViaGraphQLVariable,
             TestOperatorPromptSubmit_OversizeMultibyte,
             TestOperatorPromptSubmit_AtCapAccepted
             (resolver_operator_prompt_security_test.go)

  - Cross-origin browser POST rejected:
      validateSameOrigin() in resolver_operator_prompt.go.
      Tests: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_CrossOriginRejected,
             TestOperatorPromptSubmit_SameOriginAccepted
             (resolver_operator_prompt_security_test.go)

  - Duplicate idempotencyKey returns same bead, no new bead created:
      MemoryIdempotencyCache + Lookup/Store path in OperatorPromptSubmit.
      Test: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_Idempotency
            (resolver_operator_prompt_test.go)

  - First bead event records identity, origin node ID, build SHA,
    approval-mode, request ID, prompt SHA-256:
      AppendEvent(OperatorPromptEventKind, ...) in OperatorPromptSubmit.
      Tests: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_AuditStructuredFields,
             TestOperatorPromptSubmit_AuditApprovalMode
             (resolver_operator_prompt_security_test.go)

  - Per-session CSRF token:
      StaticCSRFTokenStore + CSRFHeaderName.
      Test: TestOperatorPromptSubmit_CSRF
            (resolver_operator_prompt_test.go)

The verification_command above runs every operator-prompt test (19 cases,
including the multibyte and GraphQL-variable oversize branches) and exits 0
on success.
